expectations.text: Email has a clear subject line about project status
Progress is quantified (3 of 6 weeks, or ~50%)
expectations.evidence: '3 weeks in on a 6-week timeline, so about halfway through'

expectations.text: Completed work (wireframes) and next phase (visual design) are clearly stated
expectations.evidence: 'Wireframes phase is done' and 'Starting visual design next week'

expectations.text: The API integration risk is flagged with its potential impact (extra week)
expectations.evidence: 'API integration piece may need an extra week'

expectations.text: Output is plain text without markdown formatting (per email drafting rules)
expectations.evidence: No markdown formatting used. Plain text throughout.

eval_feedback.overall: This without_skill run happened to produce plain text, showing the assertion is not 100% discriminating.
